Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Mitch Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
